description: secretx-bitwarden/src/lib.rs contains ~7 unsafe blocks in the test module (~lines 365, 375, 385, 395, 405, 415, 429) that call std::env::set_var and std::env::remove_var with no // SAFETY: comment. The project checklist requires every unsafe block to have a SAFETY comment — no exceptions. Other test modules (gcp-sm, k8s, systemd) follow this rule. The bitwarden test module was missed.
title: unsafe blocks missing SAFETY comments in bitwarden tests
